rationale: Android Compose camera/HUD restructure matching the PR description. New `Modifier.shimmerEffect()` in `ShimmerModifier.kt` implements the diagonal metallic-sweep gradient. New `LoadingInvoiceScreen.kt` renders provider-header, CPT-row placeholders, and balance-summary card all clipped with rounded corners and wrapped in `.shimmerEffect()`. `EobNavHost.kt` routes the `HistoryRoute` to `LoadingInvoiceScreen` while `uiState.isLoadingInvoice` is true. `EobViewModel.kt` and `AppViewModel.kt` add the `isLoadingInvoice` state flag, set on OCR/upload start, cleared when Firestore history updates or OCR/upload errors (the toast path is preserved). `CameraCaptureScreen.kt` restructures into the two-block layout with the tap-to-focus reticle; `CameraScanningOverlay.kt`, `FlowCombineExtensions.kt`, `RegistrationScreen.kt`, `FirebaseEobRepository.kt`, `FirebaseEobMapper.kt`, `EobModels.kt`, and `EobStrings.kt` are touched coherently for the supporting changes. Pure UI/view-model work, no tests required for shimmer/skeleton presentation, no cheat surface.
